name: Enlightenment
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>未</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>み</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>来</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>らい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>王</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>予</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>よ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>言</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: You cannot Summon the turn you activate this card. Activate at the end of the Damage Step, if a Spellcaster-Type monster you control attacked and destroyed an opponent's monster by battle. That monster can attack again (immediately).
eff: You cannot Summon the turn you activate this card. Activate at the end of the Damage Step, if a Spellcaster-Type monster you control attacked and destroyed an opponent's monster by battle. That monster can attack again (immediately).

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
